name: Lattice constant a of α-U (Ueff=0)
note: Orthorhombic Cmcm, unit cell, Ueff=0 eV

name: Lattice constant b of α-U (Ueff=0)
note: Orthorhombic Cmcm, unit cell, Ueff=0 eV

name: Lattice constant c of α-U (Ueff=0)
note: Orthorhombic Cmcm, unit cell, Ueff=0 eV

name: Lattice constant a of α(U) (Ueff=0)
note: U47Zr supercell, Ueff=0 eV, Zr substitution induces +0.54% expansion along a

name: Lattice constant b of α(U) (Ueff=0)
note: Zr substitution induces -0.24% contraction along b

name: Lattice constant c of α(U) (Ueff=0)
note: Zr substitution induces +0.37% expansion along c

name: Atomic volume of α(U) (Ueff=0)
note: 0.66% expansion relative to pure α-U at Ueff=0

name: Lattice constant a of α(U) (Ueff=1.24)
note: +0.91% expansion along a at Ueff=1.24 eV

name: Lattice constant b of α(U) (Ueff=1.24)
note: -0.22% contraction along b at Ueff=1.24 eV

name: Lattice constant c of α(U) (Ueff=1.24)
note: +0.77% expansion along c at Ueff=1.24 eV

name: Atomic volume of α(U) (Ueff=1.24)
note: 1.46% expansion relative to pure α-U at Ueff=1.24 eV

name: Zr substitution formation energy (Ueff=0)
note: Formation energy for Zr substitution in α-U matrix, Ueff=0 eV

name: Zr substitution formation energy (Ueff=1.24)
note: Enhanced Zr stability with on-site Coulomb effects

name: Elastic constant C11 of α-U (Ueff=1.24)
note: Reduced from 302 GPa at Ueff=0; ~10% decrease

name: Elastic constant C33 of α-U (Ueff=1.24)
note: Reduced from 358 GPa at Ueff=0; ~12% decrease

name: Elastic constant C13 of α-U (Ueff=1.24)
note: Similar to Ueff=0 value of 27 GPa

name: Bulk modulus B of α(U) (Ueff=1.24)
note: 29 GPa significant reduction from pure α-U

name: Young's modulus E of α(U) (Ueff=1.24)
note: 18 GPa reduction from pure α-U at same Ueff

name: Pugh's ratio B/G of α(U) (Ueff=1.24)
note: Decreased from 1.45 for pure α-U; Zr increases brittleness at Ueff=1.24

name: He formation energy at T-site in α-U (Ueff=0)
note: T-site (tetrahedral) is most stable for He at Ueff=0

name: He formation energy at P-site in α-U (Ueff=0)
He formation energy at T-site in α-U (Ueff=1.24)
note: At Ueff=1.24 eV, P-site is most stable

name: He formation energy at P-site in α-U (Ueff=1.24)
note: Most stable site for He at Ueff=1.24 eV

name: He formation energy range at T-site in α(U) (Ueff=1.24)
note: Range across different sites near/far from Zr; lower near Zr

name: He formation energy range at P-site in α(U) (Ueff=1.24)
note: Range across different sites; includes elevated sites at cell boundary

name: He PTx migration barrier in α-U
note: Rate-determining step for [100] and [001] He diffusion

name: He PTy migration barrier in α-U
He PPy migration barrier in α-U
note: P-to-P along [010]; rate-determining step for [010] He diffusion

name: He TTz migration barrier in α-U
He PPz migration barrier in α-U
He PTx migration barrier range in α(U)
note: 0.499 eV at boundary of He-stable region; Zr hinders long-range diffusion

name: He PPy migration barrier range in α(U)
note: Reduced near Zr atom (0.231 eV); Zr accelerates [010] crossing locally

name: He TTz migration barrier range in α(U)
U vacancy formation energy in α-U (Ueff=0)
U vacancy formation energy in α-U (Ueff=1.24)
note: Similar to reported 1.69 eV by Huang et al.

name: Substitutional Xe formation energy in α-U (Ueff=0)
Substitutional Xe formation energy in α-U (Ueff=1.24)
note: Similar to reported 6.69 eV by Huang et al.

name: Xe activation energy along [100] in α-U
note: Multi-vacancy mechanism: EV1f=0.58 + EV2f=1.95 + Em=0.21 = 2.74 eV

name: Xe activation energy along [010] in α-U
note: Dissociative mechanism: EV1f=1.22 + EV2f=0.74 + Em=0.03 = ~1.99 eV. Also cited as 2.02 eV in text

name: Xe activation energy along [001] in α-U (interplanar)
note: Interplanar migration preferred; cited in text and consistent with Huang et al.

name: Xe [100] migration barrier Em in α-U
note: Small migration barrier; vacancy formation dominates

name: ICOHP of (U-U)z bond in α-U (Ueff=1.24)
note: Strongest U-U bond direction along z

name: ICOHP of (U-Zr)y bond in α(U) (Ueff=1.24)
note: 38.6% reduction vs (U-U)y; least reduction among three directions

name: ICOHP of (U-U)*z bond in α(U) (Ueff=1.24)
note: Compensatory strengthening of U-U bonds near Zr; increased from 9.85

name: CDW suppression pressure
note: ~2‰ compression needed to suppress CDW; consistent with Raymond et al. ~1.2 GPa

name: Imaginary frequency of 422-SC Σ4 branch
note: Cmcm structure mechanical instability in 4×2×2 supercell

name: α-U → β-U phase transition temperature
note: Orthorhombic α to tetragonal β transition

name: β-U → γ-U phase transition temperature
note: Tetragonal β to BCC γ transition

name: Zr max equilibrium solubility in α(U)
note: At 661°C; corresponds to 1 Zr per 200 U atoms

name: Zr concentration in supersaturated α(U) under irradiation
note: Zr supersaturation range under in-pile conditions

name: Zr concentration in peripheral α-phase of irradiated fuel
note: Zr concentration in peripheral regions of irradiated U-10Zr fuel

name: DFT plane-wave cutoff energy
note: Standard cutoff; 600 eV for systems involving He

name: DFT plane-wave cutoff energy for He systems
Effective Hubbard U parameter
note: Applied to U 5f orbitals; value from Xie et al., widely adopted

name: He stability site transition Ueff
note: Transition from T-site to P-site as most stable He configuration at ~Ueff=0.8 eV

name: α-U C11 elastic constant (experimental, 298 K)
note: Experimental reference value at room temperature

name: U-10Zr fuel swelling at low burnup
note: U-10Zr fuel swelling reaches ~30% at relatively low burnup; cited from literature

name: Xe [100] Path 2 EV1f in α(U)
note: First vacancy formation energy along [100] Path 2 in α(U)

name: Xe [100] Path 2 EV2f in α(U)
note: Second vacancy formation energy along [100] Path 2 in α(U)

name: Xe [010] Path 1 EV1f in α(U)
note: Reduced vacancy formation near Zr along [010] Path 1; from 1.22 in pure α-U

name: Xe [001] Path 2 EV2f in α(U)
note: Reduced from 1.22 eV in pure α-U; near Zr site

name: Zr threshold concentration for accelerated Xe diffusion
note: ~8 at%; at least one Zr per corrugated plane in 322-SC model needed for significant Xe acceleration
